plugin.name: Inspector
plugin.description: Developer inspection tools for exploring live Qt widgets, layout structure, and styles.
title: Inspector
description: Inspect live widgets in the running interface. Start inspect mode, hover the UI, then left-click a widget to capture its structure, palette, and stylesheet details. If you need to move to another page first, use right-click navigation while inspect mode stays active.
path.title: Parent Chain
details.title: Widget Details
text_unlock: Unlock static text selection across the app
status.locked: Developer mode is off. Enable it from Settings to use the inspector.
status.live: Inspect mode is active. Hover the app, left-click to capture a widget, and use right-click navigation if you need to move to another page first. Press Esc to cancel.
status.text_unlock: Inspector text unlock is active. Static app text can now be highlighted and copied where supported.
status.ready: Inspector is ready. Start inspect mode to capture a widget.
